message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for v0.1.14 dependency changes

Lockfile regenerated to reflect the v0.1.13 -> v0.1.14 version bump and
updated dependency tree. New transitive dependencies include addr2line,
backtrace, fancy-regex, gimli, object, and os_pipe. The rich_rust
dependency has also been updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,15 @@
 # It is not intended for manual editing.
 version = 4
 
+[[package]]
+name = "addr2line"
+version = "0.25.1"

+dependencies = [

+]
+
